How We Work

A four-step process designed to move fast, stay aligned, and deliver results you can actually measure.

01
Discovery Call

Free 30-min strategy session. We learn your goals, audit your current presence, and identify the biggest growth levers.

02
Strategy & Proposal

We map a custom plan with clear deliverables, timelines, and KPIs. You know exactly what you're getting and when.

03
Execute & Optimise

We launch, run, and iterate weekly. Every campaign is continuously optimised based on live data — not gut feel.

04
Report & Scale

Monthly performance reviews with clear attribution. When something works, we double down. When it doesn't, we pivot fast.

About BeCréatif

We Build Brands That the World Can't Ignore.

BeCréatif was born from a simple belief — that most Indian brands deserve world-class marketing. Founded in Vadodara, Gujarat, we serve ambitious businesses across India who are ready to stop blending in and start standing out.

We combine the precision of performance marketing with the power of compelling creative storytelling. Our approach is data-informed but never data-limited — because the best marketing always starts with a bold idea.

📊 Performance Marketing · 8 min read

Best Meta Ads Strategy in 2026:
The Complete Guide for Businesses

Meta's AI now handles targeting. Here's how to win with creative quality, conversion data, and smart funnel structure.

BG
Bhavin Gojiya · BeCréatif · June 2026

Meta advertising has changed dramatically. The days of winning through audience hacks and hundreds of interest stacks are behind us. Meta's AI-driven systems now make creative quality, first-party data, and campaign objectives far more important than manual targeting. Advertisers who adapt are seeing stronger ROAS — those relying on old tactics are struggling.

+215%
Avg Conversion Lift
3.8×
Average ROAS
−22%
Cost per Lead

Why Meta Ads Still Matter in 2026

Meta remains one of the highest-performing advertising platforms for e-commerce brands, local businesses, coaches, SaaS companies, and service providers. When campaigns are built around creative testing and conversion-focused funnels, profitable returns are consistently achievable.

What Changed: AI Does the Targeting Now

Meta's AI systems increasingly decide who sees your ads, when they see them, and which placement performs best. This means audience targeting is becoming less important than creative quality.

Old approach: 20 interest audiences, manual exclusions, lookalike stacking. 2026 approach: Broad targeting + strong creatives + conversion optimisation + AI-powered delivery.

Creative Is the New Targeting

The best-performing advertisers are focused on UGC videos, customer testimonials, founder content, problem-solution videos, and product demonstrations. Meta's systems learn from creative signals more than audience settings.

A skincare brand testing a generic product image headline against a real customer before/after video will almost always see the video win — it communicates context and buyer intent far more clearly.

The Winning Meta Ads Funnel

Top of Funnel (Awareness)

  • Educational reels and problem-awareness videos
  • Industry insights and thought-leadership content

Middle of Funnel (Trust)

  • Customer testimonials and case studies
  • Product demonstrations and comparison content

Bottom of Funnel (Conversion)

  • Limited-time offers and promotions
  • Free consultations and lead magnets

Real Case Study: Local Gym

Budget: ₹20,000/month. Campaign built on video testimonials, a free trial offer, and a lead form.

42
Leads · Month 1
₹476
CPL · Month 1
₹146
CPL · Month 3

Common Mistakes to Avoid

  • Too many audience interests — let Meta's AI work
  • No creative testing — always run multiple variations
  • Sending traffic to weak landing pages
  • Running only one ad creative
  • Ignoring Conversion API (CAPI) setup

Conclusion

In 2026, Meta rewards businesses that provide strong creative diversity, authentic content, and quality conversion data. Success comes from understanding your customers and building relevant, high-quality ads — not from targeting tricks.

Ready to build a Meta Ads strategy that actually converts? Book a free strategy call with BeCréatif →

📱 Social Media · 6 min read

Social Media Marketing Tips
That Actually Work in 2026

Most brands post daily and still get zero leads. The problem isn't frequency — it's strategy. Here's what's actually moving the needle.

BG
Bhavin Gojiya · BeCréatif · June 2026

Most businesses post daily but struggle to generate a single lead. The issue isn't frequency — it's relevance. Consumer behaviour has shifted dramatically toward short-form video, social search, creator-led content, and authentic brand storytelling.

80%
Businesses Use Social Media
3.6×
More Leads with Social
2.5H
Daily Time on Platforms

Tip #1: Stop Posting Like a Brand

Start posting like a creator. People connect with founders, employees, and customers — not logos. Instead of "Buy our website package," create content like "3 website mistakes costing businesses customers." One is an ad. The other is value — and value builds trust.

Tip #2: Follow the 70-20-10 Rule

  • 70% — Education: tips, insights, how-tos
  • 20% — Trust building: testimonials, behind the scenes, case studies
  • 10% — Sales: offers, CTAs, promotions

Tip #3: Build Strong Content Pillars

  • Educational — Marketing tips, tutorials, industry insights
  • Behind the Scenes — How projects are built, team culture
  • Case Studies — Real client results with numbers
  • Personal Branding — Founder stories, values, journey

Tip #4: Double Down on Short-Form Video

Reels, Shorts, and TikToks continue to drive the strongest organic reach across every platform. Founder POV content and short educational videos are particularly high-performing because they combine authenticity with value.

Tip #5: Treat Social Media Like Search

Users increasingly search Instagram and YouTube like a search engine. Optimise your captions, video titles, and hashtags with phrases like "best marketing agency Vadodara," "website design tips," or "branding strategies for startups."

Your Monthly Content Framework

  • 8 Reels per month
  • 8 Carousel posts
  • 4 Case study posts
  • 4 Personal brand posts
  • 4 Stories every day

Conclusion

Businesses that educate, entertain, and consistently build trust outperform those focused only on selling. In 2026, authenticity and expertise are stronger growth drivers than polished corporate branding alone.

Want us to build your content strategy? Start the conversation with BeCréatif →

🌐 Website Design · 5 min read

Website Design Trends That
Increase Conversions in 2026

A beautiful website is useless if it doesn't generate leads. Here's what conversion-first design actually looks like in 2026.

BG
Bhavin Gojiya · BeCréatif · June 2026

The best websites in 2026 aren't just visually impressive — they are conversion machines. Every design decision, from load speed to the placement of a CTA, is made with one goal in mind: turning visitors into paying customers.

2.5s
Ideal Load Time
90%
Users Prefer Fast Sites
2×
Conversions with Better UX

Trend 1: Minimalist, Conversion-First Design

Visitors decide within seconds whether to stay. Minimalist design removes all friction — abundant white space, a single clear headline, and one dominant call-to-action. Every element earns its place or gets cut.

Trend 2: Speed Is Non-Negotiable

Every additional second of load time costs conversions. A site loading in 2 seconds outperforms an 8-second site dramatically — and Google rewards faster sites with higher organic rankings too. Speed is both a UX and SEO advantage.

Trend 3: Interactive Elements That Qualify Leads

The highest-converting websites in 2026 include tools that engage visitors and capture intent:

  • ROI calculators
  • Cost estimators
  • Service recommendation quizzes
  • Free marketing audit tools

Trend 4: Founder-Led Personal Branding

Businesses are increasingly putting real people front and centre because trust converts better than corporate messaging. Include a founder story, real team photos, and a short video introduction above the fold to build immediate credibility.

Trend 5: Case Studies Above the Fold

Show proof before promises. Lead with a result: "We generated 312 leads in 60 days for a local clinic." Then explain how. Social proof placed early reduces bounce rates and builds confidence faster than any headline copy.

Conversion Checklist for 2026

  • Mobile-optimised and responsive on all devices
  • Page speed under 2.5 seconds
  • Clear, single primary CTA per section
  • Testimonials and social proof visible early
  • Portfolio or case studies
  • WhatsApp integration for instant contact
  • Live chat or callback option
  • 75% of traffic from mobile — design mobile-first

Want a website built to convert? Book a free website strategy call with BeCréatif →

🏪 Local Marketing · 7 min read

Local Business Marketing Guide:
How to Get More Customers in 2026

A step-by-step system to rank higher, get more visibility, and attract high-quality local customers — combining GBP, reviews, SEO, social, and paid ads.

BG
Bhavin Gojiya · BeCréatif · June 2026

Local businesses face increasing online competition. The ones dominating local search today combine five channels into a single, compounding system — and each channel makes the others stronger.

Step 1: Optimise Your Google Business Profile

Your GBP is the single most impactful free tool available to local businesses. A complete, active profile dramatically outperforms a sparse one in local map rankings. Fill every field without exception:

  • All services listed with descriptions
  • Fresh photos added weekly
  • Accurate hours and holiday hours
  • FAQs answered
  • Social links connected
  • Regular Google Posts (weekly updates)

Step 2: Generate Reviews Consistently

Review velocity matters more than total count. Ten new reviews this month outperform fifty reviews from two years ago in the eyes of Google's local ranking algorithm. Focus on:

  • Asking every satisfied customer immediately after service
  • Sending a short WhatsApp follow-up with your review link
  • Responding to every review — positive and negative

Step 3: Create Location-Specific Pages

If you serve multiple cities, create a dedicated page for each one. This is one of the most underutilised local SEO tactics:

  • /digital-marketing-agency-ahmedabad
  • /digital-marketing-agency-vadodara
  • /digital-marketing-agency-anand

Each page should include location-specific content, testimonials, and a local CTA — not just a city name swap.

Step 4: Build Local Authority

Community recognition translates directly into search authority. Partner with local events, schools, NGOs, and business groups. Every mention of your brand in a local context builds signals that Google's local algorithm rewards.

Step 5: Run Hyper-Local Meta Ads

Set a 10–20 km radius around your location and run ads targeting local business owners or your ideal customer demographic. Lead with a low-friction offer:

  • Free 30-minute consultation
  • Free marketing audit
  • Introductory discount

Real Case Study: Dental Clinic

18
Calls/Month · Before
95+
Calls/Month · After
90
Days to Achieve

After optimising their Google Business Profile, implementing a weekly review-request system, and running local Meta Ads — a dental clinic went from 18 calls per month to 95+ in just 90 days.

The Winning Formula

Google Business Profile + Consistent Reviews + Local SEO + Social Media + Targeted Meta Ads = a local competitive advantage that compounds month over month.

Businesses that combine all five channels build a moat that local competitors simply cannot copy quickly. Each channel feeds the others — reviews improve GBP ranking, GBP drives social proof, social media supports ad performance, and ads generate more reviews.

Want this system built for your local business? Book a free strategy session with BeCréatif →
